assertions.text: Detects that the user provided an existing test file (entry point mode 3)
Skips the Test Writer phase — does NOT rewrite or replace the user's test file
Reads the existing test file from disk and passes contents to the Code Writer
Still performs GREEN verification (checksum check, all tests pass)
Still performs adversarial review on the test+implementation pair
Does NOT ask the user to confirm a work decomposition plan for a single provided test
